questions.question: Describe the time complexity of Bubble Sort for both ascending and descending order, and explain how it differs.
questions.hint: Focus on the mathematical analysis of the algorithm

questions.question: Write a step-by-step implementation of the Selection Sort algorithm in Python, clearly explaining each iteration.
Compare the space complexity of Selection Sort and Bubble Sort. Provide examples to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the comparison of auxiliary space requirements
